title: Premium Navy Blue Deluxe Flock Neck Cushion - 17.5" x 12" (1 Pc.) - Ultimate Comfort & Support, Lightweight & Ergonomic Design - Ideal for Travelling
features: ULTIMATE COMFORT & SUPPORT: Experience exceptional relaxation with our premium navy blue deluxe flock garden neck cushion, providing full neck support and reducing strain during long journeys or extended periods of sitting.

HIGH-QUALITY FLOCK MATERIAL: Made with top-notch flock material, this ultra-soft and squishy neck cushion not only offers comfort but also durability, ensuring you enjoy the support and coziness for years to come.

LIGHTWEIGHT & ERGONOMIC DESIGN: Measuring 17.5" x 12", our compact and portable neck cushion perfectly fits your neck and adapts to your body shape, offering the optimum balance between comfort and convenience during your travels.

IDEAL FOR TRAVELLING: Whether you're on an airplane, train, car, or simply lounging at home, this versatile Travel Log branded neck cushion helps you maintain a healthy and comfortable sitting position with ease.

ULTIMATE GIFT FOR TRAVELLERS: Treat yourself or a loved one to the perfect travel accessory, ensuring memorable and stress-free journeys. Get your premium navy blue deluxe flock garden neck cushion and experience unparalleled comfort during your upcoming trips.
description: Make it useable for long travel and healthy, comfortable sitting while using this item.
